untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit flag pattern detection (consolidation after sharp move, specific yearly high/low positioning relative to range). These geometric pattern conditions cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. Stop placement and profit target computation are explicitly marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be reliably inferred.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using Donchian breakouts (dc_upper/dc_lower) as flag breakout approximation and SMA_20 as mean-reversion exit. However, true flag pattern recognition requires multi-bar consolidation analysis, volatility contraction measurement, and yearly range positioning that are not available in the allowed indicator set. Success rates (64% bull upside, 23% average rise) suggest regime filtering is critical but not expressible here. Throwback/pullback monitoring requires bar-by-bar pattern continuation logic unavailable in this framework.
